summary: First full E2E test run of Morello Connally site. Backend: 17/17 pytest cases pass (packages, bookings, contacts, auth for both admins, admin RBAC, Stripe checkout creation + validation + status). Frontend: home page renders with all expected data-testids (hero, 3 pricing cards, schedule calendar/time-slot, founders phones), contact form submits, schedule form successfully books an appointment and shows schedule-success-msg, pricing 'Buy' button opens dialog and redirects to checkout.stripe.com. Admin login rejects wrong credentials with error, accepts correct credentials, dashboard shows all 4 tabs, logout returns to /admin/login. No blocking issues found.

issues: Radix Dialog missing aria-describedby/Description — accessibility warning in console (non-blocking)

action_items: Optional: add DialogDescription to shadcn dialogs (checkout dialog) to silence Radix a11y warnings.
Optional: verify admin Overview tab label 'Revenue' — text may be rendered as $ amount only; consider labelling clearly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 430-line file — acceptable at current scope but should be split if endpoints grow (auth/, admin/, checkout/ modules).
CORSMiddleware includes 'http://localhost:3000' in allow_origins alongside FRONTEND_URL — fine for dev/preview but confirm before prod deploy.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded via projection or doc.pop('_id', None) in all response paths — good.
bcrypt hashing + JWT (HS256, 8h expiry) implemented correctly; login sets httpOnly cookie AND returns Bearer token for cross-origin preview — matches auth playbook.
Seed admin routine is idempotent and re-updates password if changed in env — good.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed booking, contact, and Stripe checkout session records during test runs (safe to leave).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and passes 17/17. Frontend Home/Admin flows validated via Playwright. Stripe integration confirmed with real sk_test_emergent key: session URL points to checkout.stripe.com. Do NOT attempt to complete Stripe payment. Calendar disables Sundays + past dates; use rdp `button[name="day"]:not([disabled])` selector.
